title: Women of Ryazan
actors: Kuzma Yastrebitsky, Olga Narbekova, Yelena Maksimova
plot: Orphan Anna lives with her aunt Aliona in the Russian district of Ryazan. One day, they meet Wassily and his son Ivan. In order to marry off his son, Wassily organizes a meeting with all the town's single frauleins and out destiny...
